items.title: Show GN: LunaTools - 18가지 기능의 구글 크롬 확장 프로그램 (마우스 제스처, 탭 관리, 세션 매니저, 환율 변환...
items.summary:
LunaTools 공개한지도 오늘로 딱 1년 됐군요. 5개 기능으로 시작해서 지난 1년간 계속 업데이트해서 어느덧 18개 기능을 갖췄습니다. 기념으로 긱뉴스에 다시 올려봅니다.

구글 크롬 탭 많이 열고 쓰시는 분들, 좀 더 편하게 쓰시고 싶으신 분들 한번 써보시면 좋을듯 싶습니다

items.title: Show GN: SPAR-Framework - 물리·수학 모델 결과의 ‘정당한 해석 가능성’을 검토하는 프레임워크
items.summary:
SPAR 란?

SPAR (Sovereign Physics Autonomous Review)는
물리·수학적 모델이 어떤 결과를 냈는지만 보는 것이 아니라,
그 결과에 붙은 주장(Claim) 이 정말 정당한지 검토하는 결정론적(Deterministic) 리뷰 프레임워크입니다.

보통 테스트, 회귀검사(Regression), 수치 안정성 평가는...

items.title: Show GN: Paperclip + Gastown에서 영감을 받은, “영구기관” 컨셉의 오픈소스 AI 에이전트 프레임워크
items.summary:
안녕하세요,

Paperclip과 Gastown에서 영감을 받아, 토큰만 있으면 AI가 스스로 일을 이어가며 제품을 키워나가는 “영구기관(perpetual engine)” 컨셉의 오픈소스 에이전트 프레임워크를 만들었습니다.

핵심 아이디어는 단순합니다:
AI를 단발성 호출이 아니라, 지속적으로 작동하는 시스템으로

items.title: 분리된 구간 집합 위에서 계산하는 계산기
items.summary:
• 분리된 구간들의 합집합을 입력으로 받아 사칙연산, 함수 호출, 거듭제곱까지 수행하며, interval union arithmetic를 브라우저에서 직접 계산 가능
  • 결과 구간은 입력 합집합에서 고른 값들로 같은 식을 실수 위에서 계산했을 때의 값을 반드시 포함

items.title: @agusbuilds: @OrNiiGO @Copilot @claudeai @github @GitHubCopilot Exacto, los retry loop es una de las trampas más caras que hay. Yo he...
items.summary:
@OrNiiGO @Copilot @claudeai @github @GitHubCopilot Exacto, los retry loop es una de las trampas más caras que hay. Yo he configurado mis agentes para que hagan un máximo de dos intentos, si fallan, que lo intenten con otro modelo. Si aún así fallan, que marquen la teoría como "Necesita revisión".

Ahorra dinero, y sustos.

items.title: Show HN: OpenClawdex – Open-Source Orchestrator UI for Claude Code and Codex
items.summary:
One coding agent orchestrator UI for Claude and Codex, but actually feels nice.

Free, open-source, MIT licensed.

Why I built it:

- I wanted a lightweight UI as nice as the Codex app, but without the complexity and the custom diffs on the side

- I want files and diffs open straight in my editor!

- And I wanted both agents - Anthropic + OpenAI — in one place

How it works:

- No API keys, no OAuth, no separate billing — it just uses whatever you're already logged into. So your Claude Max and ChatGPT/Codex subscriptions both work out of the box.

- Talks to Claude Code via the Claude Agent SDK

- Talks to Codex via its app-server JSON-RPC

For now it's MacOS-only but can be easily extended to other platforms.

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47823501

Points: 2

6/ Tip 3 — Use it for the boring stuff

Don't waste your brain on:
→ Writing boilerplate code
→ Setting up folder structures
→ Writing documentation
→ Converting code between languages

Delegate ALL of this to Claude Code.

Save your focus for decisions that actually matter.

items.title: @TheGeorgePu: Alibaba just closed their best model.  Qwen 3.6 Plus - the version that rivals Claude for agentic coding - is now API on...
items.summary:
Alibaba just closed their best model.

Qwen 3.6 Plus - the version that rivals Claude for agentic coding - is now API only.

The smaller 3.6 is still free.

China just joined the same split. 

Free at the base. Paid at the frontier.

OpenAI. Anthropic. Google. Now Alibaba.

I've been running Qwen 3.5 locally for months. 

Good enough for agentic coding on a small chip.

That version doesn't get walled back up.

The window to own the frontier is closing.

Download now or subscribe forever.

items.title: @yusaku_0426: Claude Code Skillsを体系的にまとめた記事  ▼ Skillsを設計する際の要点  ・責務は1つに絞る（何でもできるSkillは作らない） ・descriptionは「何をするか+いつ使うか+主要機能」 ・SKILL.mdは...
items.summary:
Claude Code Skillsを体系的にまとめた記事

▼ Skillsを設計する際の要点

・責務は1つに絞る（何でもできるSkillは作らない）
・descriptionは「何をするか+いつ使うか+主要機能」
・SKILL.mdは500行以内（詳細はreference.mdに）
・必要なときに必要な情報だけ読ませる（Progressive Disclosure）

items.title: @sho_ai_real: Claude Code の初期設定、最初にやるべき順序：  【必ずやる】 CLAUDE.md 作成 → settings.json の permissions 定義 → hooks の実装  【余力があれば】 MCP サーバー追加 → su...
items.summary:
Claude Code の初期設定、最初にやるべき順序：

【必ずやる】
CLAUDE.md 作成 → settings.json の permissions 定義 → hooks の実装

【余力があれば】
MCP サーバー追加 → subagents 整理

自分はこの順番で効率が上がりました。

items.summary:
The OpenClaw era is over for me.

Ever since Opus 4.6 stopped working on it, accounts kept getting banned, was spending more time fixing trouble than actually having it do tasks for me. 

meanwhile a basic VPS running Claude Code with Terminal, GitHub and Vercel does the same job for me which costs way less money and headaches.

items.title: @MEEcom44: Cut our Claude Code agent's tool list from 22 to 7. Completion rate nearly doubled.  Every agent failure I've had traces...
items.summary:
Cut our Claude Code agent's tool list from 22 to 7. Completion rate nearly doubled.

Every agent failure I've had traces back to one thing: too many tools in a single context. Not the model. Not the prompt.

More tools = more surface area to fail. Fewer tools = cleaner handoffs, fewer hallucinated calls.

What's your agent tool count sitting at?

items.title: @abrynsk: Claude Codeのトークン消費が毎月エグいことになってたからめっちゃ参考になる。  @DataChaz の投稿見て特に価値高かったツール、3つ厳選。  ・Caveman Claude 　出力が劇的に簡潔に。65-75%削減で精度ほぼキ...
items.summary:
Claude Codeのトークン消費が毎月エグいことになってたからめっちゃ参考になる。

@DataChaz の投稿見て特に価値高かったツール、3つ厳選。

・Caveman Claude
　出力が劇的に簡潔に。65-75%削減で精度ほぼキープ

・RTK (Rust Token Killer)
　ターミナルログの無駄を60-90%カット。buildやinstall多めの人に最適

・Code Review Graph + Token Savior
　大規模リポジトリ勢はこれ。49倍〜97%削減報告多数

これ入れるだけで請求額かなり変わると思う。
Claude Codeやってる人チェック推奨です。

#ClaudeCode #AI開発 #個人開発

All from your terminal.

items.summary:
Okay, this one genuinely stopped me mid-scroll.

Claude Code can now watch your PR, catch a CI failure, write the fix, push the commit, and loop back around — all without you touching the keyboard.

Let that sink in for a second.

We are not talking about a smarter autocomplete. We are talking about an agent that lives inside your development cycle, holds context across the whole PR timeline, and keeps iterating until the pipeline goes green.

The /autofix-pr workflow in the latest Claude Code w

It reads your files, plans multi-step tasks, runs commands, fixes errors — all on its own.

It doesn't just suggest. It executes

items.title: @aiagent_builder: エージェントが「障害で止まった」とき、あなたの仕事は止まりましたか?  2026年4月15日、Claudeが落ちた。 https://t.co/Pa0oVZ5UxD・API・Claude Code、全部まとめてダウン。 そのとき「さあ次どう...
items.summary:
エージェントが「障害で止まった」とき、あなたの仕事は止まりましたか?

2026年4月15日、Claudeが落ちた。
https://t.co/Pa0oVZ5UxD・API・Claude Code、全部まとめてダウン。
そのとき「さあ次どうする?」と動けた人と、
固まってしまった人の差は、準備の差だった。

エージェントを使い倒すほど、依存リスクも上がる。
だからこそ今、考えておきたいことがある。

▶ タスクをどう分割すれば、一部が止まっても全体が死なないか
▶ 再実行できる粒度で作業してあるか
▶ ログと中間成果物は残してあるか

「外部LLMが落ちることを織り込んだワークフロー設計」——
これ、もはや知識労働者の基礎スキルになってきてる。

道具を信頼するのと、道具に依存するのは、まったく別のことだ。
頼り方を設計できた人が、次の波に乗れる。

https://t.co/mUEQQzRhdF
#ClaudeCode

items.title: @editxshub: Someone built a native Mac app that combines Claude Code and Codex into one Liquid Glass interface  It's called GlassCod...
items.summary:
Someone built a native Mac app that combines Claude Code and Codex into one Liquid Glass interface

It's called GlassCode

uses your existing Claude Code CLI — no extra login

What it adds:

→ run multiple agents and subagents simultaneously in one window
→ clean UI for sub-agent work with context overview per thread
→ Git integration + diff view built in
→ Skills tab to install/uninstall slash commands instantly
→ usage statistics so you know exactly what you're spending
→ full permission mode
